title: Calycolpus lucens
taxonomy: Calycolpus lucens is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This family includes many other plants commonly known as myrtles or eucalyptus. The Myrtaceae family is part of the larger order Myrtales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes families such as the Thymelaeaceae and the Penaeaceae. Within the Myrtaceae family, Calycolpus lucens is classified as part of the tribe Myrteae. This tribe is further divided into several genera, with Calycolpus being one of them.
